race.comment: ANGEL FEET (7) is in the country's top stable and had been building to something heading into last start, when he was beaten a long way, but by a horse who looks to have an exciting future. Might even be better suited back slightly in trip. ZIKRON (6) placed on debut then could only manage eighth last start, beaten 9 lengths over 1850m when he stayed at the same trip. Was probably looking for further that day and he gets that here. CERTAINLY QUIET (11) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when 5.5 lengths away in third over 2000m at Pakenham when she was handy all the way. Peak fitness now and draws to be prominent again. EGYPTIAN LEGEND (12) should also be at peak fitness and getting within 3-1/4 lengths of Arabian Prince two back reads well for this.
